message: docs: update install command to master cache-busted

files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,9 @@
```bash -# One command to catch 1000+ bug patterns -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh | bash +# One command to catch 1000+ bug patterns (always master, cache-busted) +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh?$(date +%s)" \ + | bash -s -- --easy-mode ```
